name: Logo Cutout
description: Remove solid-color backgrounds from logos and graphics, then export a transparent PNG.

zh-CN.description: 自动移除 logo 与图形的纯色背景，并导出透明 PNG。

en-US.name: Logo Cutout
en-US.description: Remove solid-color backgrounds from logos and graphics, then export a transparent PNG.
